titleStmt.title: SII 42.54: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 54. (A.R. No. B. 82 of 1953-54.) Niḍigallu, Venkatagiri Division, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone near the steps of the sluice of the tank.
Dated in Śaka 1448, Vyaya, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Monday, corresponding to 1526 A.D., July 23.

Damaged. Seems to record the construction of a sluice (Kaluṁju) to the tank at Niḍaṁgaṇṭi -Māvuram by Iṅgumānanēniṁgāru (?), the Kāryakarttā of Tirumala-nāyiniṅgāru, son of Yeggappanāyiniṅgāru and the officer-in-charge of Chandragiri-durgam for the merit of the latter and king Kṛishṇarāya. It is stated that Niḍaṁgallu lies in Kalimili(?)-sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
svasti śrīman ma
hāmaṁḍdalēśva
ra rājādi(dhi)rāja
rājaparamēśva
ra śrī vīrapratāpa śrī
vīra kṛṣṇarāya mahā
rāyalu prithivīrājya
ṁśā(sē)yanavu(va)dhariṁci śa
kābda 1448 mīṁdaṭi
vyaya saṁvaca(tsa)ra śrāvaṇa
suśu 15 sō . svasti śrīma
tu yeggappanāyini
ṁgāri komāruṁḍu ti
rumalunāyaniṁgāriki
dharmaṁgānu vīri kāryya
karttalaina yiṁgumānanē
niṁgāru kalimili sīmakuṁ
jellē niḍaṁgaṁṭi māvu
rama ceruvu kaluṁju śrī
vīra kriṣṇarāyamahā
rāyalaku caṁdragiri du
rgādhipati tirumalu nā
yinikinni dharmaṁgānu rela(nārela)
Digital edition of SII 42.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
